subject: fix(zoom): make zoom controls work on mobile by fixing overflow clipping
body:
The preview container had overflow-hidden which clipped zoomed-in canvas
content, making it appear as if zoom buttons did nothing. Changed to
overflow-auto so users can scroll the zoomed canvas. Replaced flex
centering with margin:auto so the canvas centers when small but starts
at top-left when zoomed larger than the container.

Tags: ui, zoom, mobile
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 3
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: mobile-ux
Semver: patch
